# The Shadow Empire

Features: Cosmic horror (../Features/Cosmic%20horror%207015e32dadb042b995663e84d5b48388.md)
Priority: Low
Products: TWOLD (../Data/Products/TWOLD%20e028aa0786f5449984a4f497c1d746fa.md)

A mysterious, otherworldly dimension, hostile to the primary dimension(s).

Sees the primary dimension(s) as rebel colonies that must be returned to its rule.

Initially mentioned in [The City of Orphans](../Data/Locations/The%20City%20of%20Orphans%2079bb690186294ddfbd417bfcc108b5ac.md).

Usually only brought up in city settings.
